name: Render Monitor
description: Observe every render job in flight: queue, progress, GPU utilization, and live log streaming for diagnosing failed or slow video generations.

page_briefs.renders: All-jobs dashboard. A horizontal filter bar at the top exposes status chips (queued, running, completed, failed), project selector, time range picker, and GPU-tier filter. Below, a render queue rendered as a full list shows each job row with thumbnail preview, project name, scene badge, progress bar with percentage, ETA, elapsed time, GPU label, and contextual actions (cancel, retry, download) aligned right.
page_briefs.render-detail: Single render job focus view. Top region is a detail header with large preview thumbnail, job title, status badge, progress ring, key metrics (frames rendered, elapsed, ETA, GPU model), and action buttons (cancel, retry, download artifact). Below, a full-height live log stream component displays streaming stdout with timestamp gutters, severity color coding, auto-scroll lock, filter input, and copy/download controls.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area
